description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with graphic print on the chestFittingComfortWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/reverse Do not scrub Inspired by the Star Wars series and dedicated to warring graffitti artists, this tee from inkfruit is all that one needs to flaunt a cheeky attitude. Made of cotton, this tee is designed to keep you comfortable and dry through all seasons. Team it with denims or cargos for that casual look, while you can add on a pair of fashionable footwear from the wide range available at myntra to complete your style mantra.
